command: echo '=== Check .ex5 ===' && find '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts' -name 'PropFirmBot*' -ls 2>/dev/null && echo '=== MT5 running ===' && ps aux | grep terminal64 | grep -v grep && echo '=== Latest EA log ===' && EALOG=$(ls -t '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Logs/'*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1) && echo "Log: $EALOG" && tail -20 "$EALOG" 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\0'
